narrative:
Strongsville-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 708 registered voters, with 64.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.8 percentage points.
